title: Cross-cutting hardening & release
objective: Harden and release what PH-1 and PH-2 built: an OWASP ASVS L2 security sweep, testing hardening, production deployment with backup and warm-standby restore, and a final acceptance audit against the release gates. RECONCILIATION: the roadmap classifies P16–P19 as cross-cutting under no phase; PH-4 exists solely to satisfy the NOT NULL foreign key on slices.phase_id; the two records are consistent, not conflicting. See DEC-029 and SC-001.
exit_criteria: All four cross-cutting slices shipped and merged to main with CI green; the final release-readiness audit produced and its verdict recorded. Met: P16, P17, P18 and P19 all shipped; the audit returned a conditional no-go pending operator go-live actions, not further build work.

title: Cloud hosting & environments
objective: Deploy ACMP to AWS as two internet-facing environments — staging/UAT (uat.acmp.anas7ammo.dev) and production (acmp.anas7ammo.dev) — on EC2 + Docker Compose (single host per environment), reducing footprint by folding Keycloak's datastore onto the existing SQL Server, replacing self-hosted MinIO with managed Amazon S3, and consolidating the container set. Includes a manual user-seeding script, a CD image-publish pipeline, backup/restore/DR for two SQL databases, TLS via Let's Encrypt DNS-01, deployment smoke + Playwright testing, and hard AWS spend controls. Post-P19 work: the on-prem P1–P19 ladder is complete; this phase adds a cloud target. PROPOSED pending operator ratification of ADR-0034..0037 (which amend INV-003/CON-001/CON-003/ADR-0013).
exit_criteria: Both environments reachable over HTTPS on their subdomains with a green smoke run and the existing Playwright suite passing against UAT; Keycloak persists to SQL Server with no Postgres container; recordings on S3 with no MinIO container; backup→restore 3→0→3 verified on both databases on Express edition; UAT/prod credential, bucket and DNS isolation proven; budget alerts + auto-stop action provisioned; all four ADRs ratified.
source_span: operator request 2026-07-23; plan cozy-scribbling-music.md rev2 approved
